Executive Profile

Enterprise Learning Architect and Instructional Designer with 10+ years building high-impact learning ecosystems across Fortune 100 enterprises, government agencies, utility companies, and K–12 education systems. Track record of 100% first-submission approvals, 30–40% performance gains, and 95% satisfaction ratings through the strategic integration of instructional design, AI-enhanced workflows, and organizational change management. Trusted by C-suite stakeholders to translate complex technical systems into measurable workforce readiness — on time and at scale.

What I Do —
And What It Delivers

Every capability listed here is backed by a real outcome. This is not a list of tools — it is a record of results.

📐
Instructional Design & eLearning
  • Articulate Storyline 360 & Rise — built scenario-based courses with 95% learner satisfaction ratings
  • Curriculum Architecture — designed programs from scratch, including a statewide initiative approved 100% on first submission
  • VILT Design & Facilitation — 60-min multi-audience sessions for enterprise platform rollouts across Legal and Supply teams
  • Performance Support & Job Aids — created the original L.E.A.P. framework from gap analysis; redesigned with AI for enterprise deployment
  • Training Needs & Gap Analysis — SAT-aligned TNA, DIF analysis, and stakeholder analysis informing every design decision
  • ADDIE & Agile ID — led 10-member teams through 30-week Agile cycles, improving exam performance by 30%
🤖
AI Integration & Automation
  • Generative AI Workflows — integrated ChatGPT, Copilot & Gemini into production pipelines, cutting design cycles significantly
  • AI-Automated Curriculum Mapping — used AI to build multi-state standards crosswalks across 6 states at scale
  • AI Voiceover Pipelines — deployed WellSaid Labs & Murf.ai to automate audio, reducing multimedia production timelines and cost
  • Prompt Engineering — structured AI prompts for role-based job-task analyses and branching scenario design
  • AI-Enhanced Job Aid Redesign — used AI ideation to redesign pilot job aid into enterprise-grade performance tool
  • Visual AI Tools — Canva AI, Midjourney, and GitHub Copilot integrated into creative and development workflows
🔄
Organizational Change Management
  • Full-Cycle OCM — led stakeholder engagement, resistance mitigation, and adoption strategy for multi-billion dollar utility transformations
  • Change & Impact Analysis — mapped change scenarios across Legal, Supply, and Business Partner audiences for enterprise CLM rollout
  • SAT-Aligned Evaluation — designed multi-format measurement frameworks with Power BI reporting for continuous improvement
  • Enterprise Platform Adoption — governed training for SAP Concur, IBM Maximo, GEP SMART, and CLM platforms for 500+ professionals
  • Communication & Readiness Strategy — developed change communications that accelerated system adoption and reduced user error rates
  • Blended Learning Ecosystems — VILT, ClickLearn job aids, Visio diagrams, LMS courses, and office hours working as one system
🌐
